content:
graph TD
    A["Damp Heat Exposure Begins"] --> B["Initial Phase: Adhesion Declining [13]"]
    B -->|"< 1 year field / < 1000 h chamber"| C{"Degradation Trajectory"}
    C -->|"Field & Chamber Studies [13]"| D["Adhesion Plateau Phase [13]"]
    C -->|"Lap Joint Studies [6]"| E["Strength Decrease Then Rise [6]"]
    E -->|"Post-curing hardening"| F["Transient Recovery [6]"]
    D -->|"1000 h = IEC 61215 test duration"| G["Standard Qualification Checkpoint"]
    G --> H{"Pass/Fail Assessment [16]"}
    H -->|"69% pass < 6% power loss"| I["69% BOMs Pass [16]"]
    H -->|"31% fail or borderline"| J["15 Manufacturers With Failures [16]"]
    D -->|"Beyond plateau"| K["Potential Further Degradation?"]
    F -->|"Beyond recovery"| K
    K -->|"Untested duration"| L["Long-Term Field Outcome Unknown"]

    style A fill:#339af0,color:#fff
    style B fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style D fill:#fcc419,color:#333
    style F fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style I fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style J fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style K fill:#fcc419,color:#333
    style L fill:#868e96,color:#fff
